title: cattleya quadricolor
intro: Cattleya quadricolor, also known as the quadracolor orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Cattleya genus. Traditionally, the roots of this plant are used for medicinal purposes, specifically for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cattleya quadricolor are said to include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the roots are often dried and crushed to be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
